说明: 王艳华（日常称王太太）：数学组王峻峰之妻；爽朗、爱张罗饭局与家长群；与林慧茹不同路数，制造社交层面的闲话与目光。
阵容外貌: 红色上衣、黑色铅笔裙与高跟鞋；高马尾，爽朗外向

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: adult woman, large breasts, curvy hips, mature female body
固化.容貌与发型: asian, lively dark eyes, black hair, high ponytail with loose strands, light blush, fair skin, tasteful makeup, mature female, 38 years old
固化.气质与年龄感: outgoing, organizer type, chatty parent-spouse energy, aged up, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: red silk blouse with subtle floral pattern, three-quarter sleeves, modest neckline
服装固化.配饰: thin gold necklace, small clutch bag
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face, perfect detailed eyes, realistic iris and pupils

负面提示词_通用: lowres, worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, censored, bar censor, mosaic censor, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad proportions, bad perspective
负面提示词_外貌纠错: blonde hair, blue eyes, green eyes, red eyes, child, loli, shota, toddler face, baby face, teen, petite, muscular female, old woman, wrinkled face, grey hair, white hair, bald, round glasses, sunglasses, twintails, drill hair, 2girls, multiple girls, multiple people, male, man, deformed eyes, weird eyes, crossed eyes, mismatched eyes, blurry eyes, empty eyes, doll eyes, anime eyes, cartoony eyes, plastic eyes
负面提示词_服装纠错: different outfit, outfit change, casual hoodie, bikini, swimsuit, nude, naked, topless, pantless, jeans, shorts, overalls, school uniform

版本.变更摘要: 名称改为本名王艳华；说明补配偶姓名王峻峰、与林慧茹区分
